recommendations.recommendation: Extract discount calculation into a pure helper before adding the new rule so the change stays local and testable under time pressure.
Require boundary tests at `500` and just below it, plus a stacking test above `1000`, because the new rule overlaps with an existing threshold-based discount.
Do not refactor persistence, mail, audit, or method signatures in this release-window change; keep the scope limited to discount calculation.
